title: Usage Wizard
subtitle: From config check to daily use — unlock your AI assistant's full potential
readinessAlmost: Almost ready, consider completing the following
secModelDesc: Configure AI providers and models — the most important setting
secIdentityDesc: Set up AI's name, vibe, and your user profile
secChannelDesc: Connect chat apps to talk with your AI assistant
fallback: Fallback model (auto-switch when primary is down)
heartbeatModel: Heartbeat model (for periodic checks, use a cheap model)
modelGoEditorHint: Go to the Editor's Model Setup to configure providers and models
modelConfigPath: Config Center → Models → Providers / Primary Model / Fallback Models
noChannelHint: Go to the Editor's Channel Setup to connect a chat app
channelConfigPath: Config Center → Channels → Add channel and fill in Token
identityQaSubtitle: Answer a few questions to set up AI's identity and your profile
qaRolePlaceholder: e.g. AI assistant, robot, familiar, ghost in the machine
qaUserInfoPlaceholder: e.g. Software engineer, loves photography and travel, UTC+8
identityDesc: AI's name, creature type, vibe, and emoji — its identity card.
userDesc: Tell AI who you are: profession, preferences, timezone, languages. The more detail, the better it understands you.
memoryToggleDesc: When enabled, AI remembers your conversations, preferences, and important info
memoryEx1: Remember your work habits and preferences
memoryEx4: Give more accurate suggestions based on history
dailyLogDesc: Append-only daily records. Today's and yesterday's logs are auto-loaded at startup.
memoryFlushDesc: Auto-save important info when session nears compaction, preventing memory loss.
memoryTip: Tip: Tell AI "remember this" and it will write to memory files. Don't rely only on session memory.
gwErrorDesc: The Usage Wizard needs a connection to the OpenClaw gateway to read config. Please ensure the gateway is running.
completionDesc: Congratulations! All configuration checks passed. Your AI assistant is ready to go.
secMemoryDesc: Long-term memory, memory flush, and vector search
authMode: Auth mode (recommend enabling token or password auth)
memoryFlushHint: Enable memory flush to auto-save important info when session nears compaction
memoryFlushConfigPath: Config Center → Session → Compaction → Enable memoryFlush
securityAuthHint: Auth mode is currently 'none'. Set a token or password to protect the gateway
securityAuthPath: Config Center → Gateway → Auth → Select auth mode
securityTlsHint: Enable TLS encryption to protect data in transit
securityTlsPath: Config Center → Gateway → TLS → Configure certificate
capabilitySubtitle: These settings directly affect what OpenClaw can do, even when the rest of the system is configured correctly.
capProfileRecommend: The current tools.profile is not full. If you need complete access to all features, you can enable full, but it unlocks more tool capabilities and carries higher risk. Only enable it after confirming the safety implications.
capAllowOk: No tool whitelist is limiting capabilities.
capAllowRecommend: Review tools.allow. Anything not on the allow list will be unavailable.
capDenyRecommend: Review tools.deny and remove blocked shell, browser, web, or file tools if you want full capability.
capBashRecommend: Enable commands.bash if you want the assistant to run terminal commands.
capBrowserRecommend: Enable browser.enabled if you want page navigation, browsing, and web automation.
capBrowserEvalBlocked: Browser automation is off, so page evaluation is unavailable too.
capBrowserEvalRecommend: Enable browser.evaluateEnabled if you want more complex page interaction.
capWebSearchRecommend: Enable tools.web.search.enabled to improve online search capability.
capWebFetchRecommend: Enable tools.web.fetch.enabled if you want the assistant to reliably read page content.
capMediaImageRecommend: Enable tools.media.image.enabled for image understanding tasks.
capMediaAudioRecommend: Enable tools.media.audio.enabled for audio understanding tasks.
capMediaVideoRecommend: Enable tools.media.video.enabled for video understanding tasks.
